headerDisplay: homebridge-wled-presets: HomeKit support for WLED focused on presets. See the [Github project page](https://github.com/ncovercash/homebridge-wled-presets) for more documentation.
footerDisplay: Configure at least one WLED device with a valid IP address to enable the plugin.

name.title: WLED name
name.description: Name for this WLED instance, to be displayed in HomeKit.

host.title: WLED IP address(es)
host.description: IP address for this WLED instance, or a comma separated list of multiple IP addresses.

presetUpdateCheckIntervalSeconds.title: Preset update check interval (seconds)
presetUpdateCheckIntervalSeconds.description: How many seconds the plugin should wait between checking for preset updates on the WLED device. Set to 0 to disable periodic checks and only check for updates when the plugin starts.

softwareUpdateCheckIntervalSeconds.title: Software update check interval (seconds)
softwareUpdateCheckIntervalSeconds.description: How many seconds the plugin should wait between checking for software updates on the WLED device. Set to 0 to disable update checks. Default 6 hours.
